CustomField.formula: IF( AND(ISBLANK(Actual_End_date__c), CONTAINS(TEXT(Task_Type__c), 'Resident Engineer')), 0, IF( Today() > Actual_End_date__c || ISPICKVAL(Task_Status__c, 'Cancelled'), IF( (ISPICKVAL( Revenue_Type__c, 'Paid Upon Delivery' ) && Line_Value__c != 0 )|| ISPICKVAL(Task_Status__c, 'Cancelled'), IF( CONTAINS(TEXT(Task_Type__c), 'Resident Engineer'), IF(Hidden_Resident_Engineer_Hrs_25__c > 1, 1, Hidden_Resident_Engineer_Hrs_25__c) , IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c,'Migration')), Hours_Consumed_Locked__c, IF( ISBLANK(End_Date__c), 0, 1 ) ) ) ,1), IF( (ISPICKVAL(Task_Status__c, 'Completed')|| ISPICKVAL(Task_Status__c, 'Closed Short')) && (NOT(ISPICKVAL(Revenue_Type__c, 'Paid Upon Delivery')) || (ISPICKVAL(Revenue_Type__c, 'Paid Upon Delivery') && Line_Value__c = 0 )) && NOT(Hidden_Task_Completed_After_25__c), IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c,'Migration'),ISPICKVAL(Task_Status__c,'Closed Short')),0,1), IF( CONTAINS(TEXT(Task_Type__c), 'Resident Engineer'), IF(Hidden_Resident_Engineer_Hrs_25__c > 1, 1, Hidden_Resident_Engineer_Hrs_25__c), IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c,'Migration')), Hours_Consumed_Locked__c, IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c,'Migration'),ISPICKVAL(Task_Status__c,'Completed')),1,0) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Hidden Task Completion 25 Non TE
